articles.title: The VR May Challenge has been announced, and sign-ups are open!
articles.snippet: All you need to know about the VR May Challenge, our next Pokémon Champions tournament, held online on 2–3 May 2026!

articles.title: Receive a shiny Volcanion via Pokémon HOME!
articles.snippet: Complete the Lumiose, Hyperspace and Mega Evolution Pokédexes in the mobile app of Pokémon HOME to redeem a shiny Volcanion! It is the first time ever Volcanion is available as shiny!

articles.title: Teams, results and all info from the 2026 Prague Regional Championships!
articles.snippet: 2025 EUIC finalist in the Senior division Louis Fontvieille has won his first major title as a Masters player! Louis defeated 2025 LAIC finalist Víctor Medina in the finals of the Prague Regional…

articles.title: Sign-ups for the Global Challenge are open!
articles.snippet: This online competition, the first of the circuit in Pokémon Champions and held on 1–4 May 2026, grants invites to the JCS Qualifier and the Trainers Cup to the best players in Japan and Korea,…

articles.title: Pokemon TCG: Paldean Fates Now Available
articles.snippet: The latest Pokemon TCG expansion featuring Shiny Pokemon is now available at retailers.
